# Security Policy

Due to its structure and use cases, Viv has a minimal security surface. The compiler processes author-supplied source files, and the runtime operates over content bundles produced by the compiler. As such, neither component handles untrusted user input, network requests, or file-system access.

That said, if you discover a security vulnerability in Viv, please report it privately via email to [support@sifty.studio](mailto:support@sifty.studio) (in lieu of opening a public issue).

We'll acknowledge your report as soon as we are able, and then work with you to understand and address the issue.
